applications.performance: It is demonstrated that the specific capacity, charge/discharge rate capability, and cycling stability of LiCoO2 can be enhanced by coating mRGO, pRGO or GQDs. The GQDs, owing to its shrunken lateral dimensions, cannot cover the surfaces of LiCoO2 as efficient as mRGO that weakens its effect on electrochemical properties of LiCoO2.

feedback.label: Good
feedback.expert_comment: Grounded Verification: All extracted content is fully supported by the source text. The model correctly returned 'null' or '[MISSING]' for fields absent in the document, avoiding unsupported inferences or hallucinations. | Applicability Verified: The extracted aplication domains align perfectly with those mentioned in the source text. The model accurately identified, listed and described all relevant application areas for the Carbon Dots used in the article. | Structural Integrity: The output matches the required JSON schema perfectly. Complex nested arrays (such as precursors/dopants and application domains) were populated correctly without truncating list items or breaking the syntax.
